quarterly_trend.detail: Qualified-lead rate reached 41% after form and package alignment.
Retainer attach from project deals rose to 23%.
Average proposal turnaround reduced from 11 to 6 days.
MRR surpassed $140K with advisory and retainer growth.

top_actions.title: Increase ABM landing pages
top_actions.description: Launch at least 3 sector ABM pages linked to booking and checkout paths.

top_actions.title: Scale partner-sourced pipeline
top_actions.description: Activate partner tiers and monthly co-sell review process.

top_actions.title: Optimize nurture conversion
top_actions.description: Run segmented email sequences and track meeting-book rates per segment.
